message:
test(proptest): add native_events, recorder_lexical_ingest, and recorder_lexical_schema property test suites

Three new property test files (~1539 lines total) covering the native event
system and recorder lexical subsystem:

proptest_native_events.rs (460 lines):
- Property tests for the native terminal event pipeline: event construction
  with arbitrary payloads, event ID uniqueness generation, timestamp monotonicity,
  event serialization/deserialization roundtrips, event filtering by type and
  pane, batch event processing ordering guarantees, event deduplication

proptest_recorder_lexical_ingest.rs (595 lines):
- Property tests for recorder lexical index ingestion: segment text extraction
  and tokenization, token offset tracking through ingestion pipeline, multi-pane
  concurrent ingestion ordering, ingestion idempotency (re-ingesting same
  segment), ordinal continuity across segment boundaries, gap detection and
  handling during ingestion, ingestion with mixed encoding segments

proptest_recorder_lexical_schema.rs (484 lines):
- Property tests for recorder lexical schema validation: schema version
  compatibility checking, field type validation, index field configuration,
  schema migration path validation, backward-compatible field additions,
  schema fingerprint stability, default value handling for optional fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
